name: Pixie Dust Fertilizer
effect: Increase the base production of Farms by +98. Reduces cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Fairy Workers
effect: Increase the production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths by 10,000%.

name: Kind Hearts
effect: Increases maximum Mana additively based on Good buildings owned.
formula: +(1.3 * x ^ 0.7), where x is Good buildings owned

name: Fairy Cuisine
effect: Increase the base production of Inns by +234. Reduce building cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Golden Pots
effect: Additively increase clicking reward by 20% of production of Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths combined.

name: Spellsmith
effect: Blacksmiths also increase your Mana Regeneration.
formula: +(2.75 * x ^ 0.275), where x is Blacksmiths owned

name: Starmetal Alloys
effect: Increase the base production of Blacksmiths by +580. Reduces cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.13).

name: Rainbow Link
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
formula: (0.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is Farms + Inns + Blacksmiths

name: Swarm of Fairies
effect: Gain assistants based on Farms, Inns and Blacksmiths owned.
formula: +(1.2 * x ^ 0.6), where x is Farms + Inns + Blacksmiths

name: Bubble Swarm
effect: Increase maximum Mana based on the highest Swarming Towers built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(x ^ 1.05), where x is highest Swarming Towers this Reincarnation

name: Pheromones
effect: Gain assistants additively based on time spent as Chaos this Reincarnation.
formula: +(80 * x ^ 0.8), where x is Chaos time this Reincarnation

name: Dream Catchers
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.2 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is Chaos spells cast this Reincarnation

name: Elven Mint
effect: The base chance to find Faction Coins is increased multiplicatively by 150%.

name: Elven Treasure Casing
effect: Increase base clicking reward by +25,000 per Trophy unlocked. Increase FC find chance based on Trophies.
formula: +(1 + 0.1 * x) ^ 0.95)%, where x is Trophies unlocked

name: Ancient Clicking Arts
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.25), where x is clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Emissary
effect: Increase clicking reward based on Good buildings owned. Assistants find 3x as many Faction Coins.
formula: (x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Good buildings owned

name: Elven Efficiency
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is FC found this Era

name: Secret Clicking Techniques
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (2 * x ^ 0.4)%, where x is clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Diplomacy
effect: Clicks count more based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is FC found this Era

name: Elven Luck
effect: Each click has a 1% chance to produce 2500% of total production in coins and generate bonus Faction Coins. Assistants trigger this once per second.
formula: Production: (2500 * (x + y)); FC: (x * (R+1)), where R is reincarnations

name: Sylvan Treasure Frills
effect: Additively increase base clicking reward by 50% of your building production.

name: Wooden Dice
effect: Increase Elven Luck chance and effects based on highest Arboreal Cities this Reincarnation. Also triggers 100,000 Tax Collections on Luck proc.
formula: Luck chance: +(x ^ 0.4)%; Prod: (40 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest Arboreal Cities

name: Camouflage
effect: Assistants and Clicks count 1,000% more for all purposes. Increase assistant production based on assistants owned.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Elven Discipline
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(50 * ln(1 + x) ^ 1.5) additive; (1.5 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.5)% multiplicative, where x is FC this Era

name: Holy Bells
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on buildings owned.
formula: +(1.6 * x ^ 0.4), where x is buildings owned

name: Angelic Determination
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on spells cast this Era. Increase Angel Coins found by 500%.
formula: (4 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is spells cast this Era

name: Angel Feathers
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on active spells.
formula: +(10 * x)%, where x is active spells

name: Guardian Angels
effect: Spell casts count 100% more.

name: Angelic Wisdom
effect: Decrease cost of all spells by 50%. Increases offline spell cast amount based on offline Mana Regeneration.
formula: (10 * log10(1 + x))%, where x is offline Mana Regen

name: Archangel Feathers
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration multiplicatively by 50%.

effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on time spent as Good this Reincarnation.

effect: Spell durations are increased by 50%.

formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Order time this Reincarnation

formula: +(0.5 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2), where x is FC found this Era

formula: (2 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Evil buildings owned

formula: (0.75 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.25)%, where x is coins owned

effect: Whenever you cast a spell, also cast a Tax Collection for free.

effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on highest Witch Conclaves owned this Reincarnation.
formula: floor(2 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is highest Witch Conclaves this Reincarnation

formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is highest Slave Markets this Reincarnation

effect: Reduce Non-Unique building cost multiplier by 0.01 (becomes 1.14). Increase Non-Unique building production based on buildings of same tier.
formula: (x ^ 0.65)%, where x is buildings of same tier

formula: +(ln(1 + x) ^ 1.75)%, where x is assistants owned

effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent this Era.

effect: Buildings count 75% more.

effect: Increase the production of assistants by 1500%.

effect: Increase base production of Evil Fortresses by +200,000 and Hell Portals by +2,000,000. Playtime this Era counts more by 6 extra hours.

effect: Increase base production of Warrior Barracks/Slave Pens/Deep Mines by +9,635 and Cathedrals/Dark Temples/Monasteries by +98,000 (by alignment). Also increase those tiers' production by 1,000%.

effect: Increase production of all buildings based on active spells.
formula: (15 * x)%, where x is active spells
